General.Name: Twin Hospitality Group Inc.
General.Description: Twin Hospitality Group Inc. operates and franchises specialty casual dining restaurant in the United States and internationally. It operates restaurants under Twin Peaks and Smokey Bones names. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is headquartered in Dallas, Texas. Twin Hospitality Group Inc. is a subsidiary of FAT Brands Inc. On January 26, 2026, Twin Hospitality Group Inc. filed a voluntary petition for reorganization under Chapter 11 in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas.
General.Address: 5151 Belt Line Road, Dallas, TX, United States, 75254
